description: Fiscal account. Contains at least two registration marks, one of which is الحمد لله وبه توفيقي. Also mentions Jews (al-Yahūd) and contains a ḥasbala. Dated Muḥarram [.]84. Scribal practice on verso. Another document written between the lines in faded brown ink.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
